channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from global sources

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE rejects Iranian accusations of war involvement
item.description: The UAE Foreign Ministry rejected Iranian claims that Abu Dhabi was an "active partner" in the US-Israel war, calling them attempts to justify Iranian attacks on the Gulf nation. Iran had accused the UAE of involvement after the BRICS meeting in New Delhi.

item.title: 🇵🇱 US cancels planned deployment of 4,000 troops to Poland
item.description: The Pentagon abruptly cancelled a planned deployment of 4,000 U.S. troops to Poland, with no explanation from Defense Secretary Hegseth. The move follows U.S. plans to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany, raising concerns about U.S. military commitments to European allies.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Russia planning new offensive from Belarus, Zelensky warns
item.description: President Zelensky said Russia is stepping up efforts to drag Belarus into the war, with Moscow planning potential attacks on Ukraine or NATO states from Belarusian territory. Ukraine has strengthened its northern border defenses in response.

item.title: 🛸 Russian drone force passes 100,000 personnel, copying Ukraine model
item.description: Russia has expanded its drone forces from 86,000 to over 114,000 personnel and is on track to reach 168,000 by year-end, effectively copying Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces structure, according to Ukrainian commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi.

item.title: 🦠 New Ebola outbreak confirmed in Congo with 65 deaths
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak has been confirmed in Congo's Ituri province with 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths. The outbreak comes five months after Congo's previous outbreak was declared over, raising fears of wider spread near Uganda and South Sudan borders.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Trump Discusses Taiwan Arms Sales With Xi Jinping
item.description: President Trump revealed he discussed US arms sales to Taiwan during his Beijing summit with Xi Jinping, saying a decision would come soon. The issue remains a major flashpoint in US-China relations.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Patience With Iran Running Thin
item.description: President Trump stated he would not be "much more patient" with Iran as negotiations continue, while suggesting the quest to retrieve enriched uranium was more about perception than security.

item.title: 🇨🇳🛢️ Trump Discussed Lifting Sanctions on Chinese Companies Buying Iranian Oil
item.description: President Trump revealed he discussed potentially lifting sanctions on Chinese companies purchasing Iranian oil during his Beijing visit, with a decision expected soon.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 CIA Director Ratcliffe Meets Cuban Officials in Havana
item.description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe held high-level talks with Cuban officials including Raúl Castros grandson, discussing intelligence cooperation and security issues amid tensions over US energy blockade.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇦🇪 India and UAE sign defense and energy deals during Modi state visit
item.description: India and the UAE signed a framework for a strategic defense partnership and petroleum supply agreements during PM Modi's visit, with the UAE announcing billion in investments. The deals deepen ties as both nations navigate the Iran conflict's impact on energy markets.

item.title: 🇪🇸🎤 Spain PM backs Eurovision boycott, says silence on Gaza "not an option"
item.description: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez defended Spain's boycott of Eurovision over Israel's participation, saying it puts the country "on the right side of history" and warning against "double standards" compared to Russia's exclusion.

item.title: 🇺🇦🛸 Ukrainian drone pilots demonstrate edge during NATO drills on Gotland
item.description: Ukrainian drone pilots showcased advanced tactics during NATO exercises on Sweden's Gotland island, demonstrating lessons from combat experience. Meanwhile, a US House discharge petition forced a vote on nearly billion in new Ukraine aid.

item.title: 🇱🇧💸 Iran war deepens Lebanon's economic crisis with job losses and inflation
item.description: The Iran-Israel conflict has worsened Lebanon's economic crisis, with businesses closing, prices spiking, and job losses mounting. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has sent economic shockwaves across the Middle East.

item.title: 🌍 BRICS talks end without joint statement over Iran war divisions
item.description: A BRICS meeting in India failed to produce a joint statement as members could not agree on language regarding the Iran conflict, exposing diplomatic rifts within the bloc.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran FM says trust deficit main obstacle in US negotiations
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated that Tehran cannot trust the US and would only negotiate if Washington shows seriousness, during a press conference in New Delhi following a BRICS meeting.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran doubts US seriousness about nuclear talks amid deadlock
item.description: Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi expressed distrust of US intentions regarding war negotiations, saying enriched uranium remains a point of deadlock in any potential talks.

item.title: 🇰🇷 Samsung faces 18-day strike as AI boom sparks worker divisions
item.description: South Korean chip giant Samsung faces an impending 18-day strike that has rattled investors and threatens global supply chains, driven by disputes over how AI boom profits should be shared with workers.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Missile Strike Kills 24 in Kyiv Apartment Building
item.description: A Russian missile struck a residential building in Kyiv, killing 24 people including three children. President Zelenskiy called for punishment of Moscow as rescue workers recovered bodies from the rubble.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Arrests Ukrainian National Suspected of Spying for Russia
item.description: German prosecutors announced the arrest of a Ukrainian national on suspicion of espionage for Russia. The case highlights ongoing intelligence threats in Europe amid the Ukraine war.

item.title: ⚔️ US Admiral: Iran Military Capability Dramatically Degraded
item.description: The US admiral commanding the Iran war effort said American strikes have left Tehran with only small or moderate ability to strike its neighbors, describing major damage to Irans defense industry.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran FM: No Trust in US, Will Negotiate Only If Serious
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said Tehran has no trust in Washington and will only negotiate if the US shows seriousness. He added that all vessels can pass through Hormuz except those at war with Iran.

item.title: 🇵🇱 US Cancels Planned Deployment of 4,000 Troops to Poland
item.description: The Pentagon scrapped plans to temporarily deploy 4,000 US-based troops to Poland, raising fresh questions about Trumps expected troop cuts in Europe and NATOs eastern flank security.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran says Pakistan mediation with US at impasse over uranium enrichment
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated that Pakistan-mediated talks with the US face deadlock over the enriched uranium issue, while welcoming potential Chinese diplomatic involvement.

item.title: 🌍 UN agencies warn Somalia faces renewed famine risk as hunger crisis deepens
item.description: Nearly 6 million people face acute food insecurity in Somalia with famine risk emerging in the southwest, as UN agencies call for urgent international assistance.

item.title: 🚁 Ukraine races to deploy AI-powered drone swarms to counter Russian manpower advantage
item.description: Ukrainian defense industry is advancing swarm drone technology that would allow few operators to deploy dozens or hundreds of autonomous attack craft, though mass battlefield deployment remains years away.
